name: CyberGhost VPN
tagline: Budget VPN with 11,700+ servers, streaming-optimized, from $2.03/mo on 2-year plans
pros: Largest server network — 11,700+ servers in 100 countries
Specialised servers for streaming, torrenting, and gaming (clearly labelled in-app)
Very cheap on 2-year plans ($2.03/mo with 2 months free)
NoSpy servers in Romanian HQ (extra jurisdiction protection)
Beginner-friendly UI with one-click streaming profiles
cons: Owned by Kape Technologies (also owns ExpressVPN, PIA) — consolidation concerns for privacy purists
Speed is lower than NordLynx in most independent tests
Not as effective in heavily-censored countries (China, UAE variable)
Audited less frequently than NordVPN or ExpressVPN
